inputs.label: Primary Voltage
inputs.businessContext: Line-to-line voltage on the primary side of the transformer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Line-to-line voltage on the primary side of the transformer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Transformatörün birincil tarafındaki hatlar arası gerilim.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verkettete Spannung auf der Primärseite des Transformators.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tension composée côté primaire du transformateur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión línea a línea en el lado primario del transformador.

inputs.label: Secondary Voltage
inputs.businessContext: Line-to-line voltage on the secondary side of the transformer (fault location).

businessContext_i18n.en: Line-to-line voltage on the secondary side of the transformer (fault location).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Transformatörün ikincil tarafındaki (arıza konumu) hatlar arası gerilim.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verkettete Spannung auf der Sekundärseite des Transformators (Fehlerort).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tension composée côté secondaire du transformateur (emplacement du défaut).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión línea a línea en el lado secundario del transformador (ubicación de la falla).

inputs.label: Source Short-Circuit MVA
inputs.businessContext: Available short-circuit MVA from the upstream source at the primary voltage level.

label_i18n.es: MVA de cortocircuito de la fuente

businessContext_i18n.en: Available short-circuit MVA from the upstream source at the primary voltage level.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birincil gerilim seviyesinde yukarı akış kaynağından mevcut kısa devre MVA'sı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verfügbare Kurzschluss-MVA von der vorgelagerten Quelle auf der Primärspannungsebene.
businessContext_i18n.fr: MVA de court-circuit disponible depuis la source amont au niveau de tension primaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: MVA de cortocircuito disponible desde la fuente aguas arriba al nivel de tensión primaria.

inputs.label: Transformer %Z
inputs.businessContext: Percent impedance of the transformer based on its own kVA rating.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percent impedance of the transformer based on its own kVA rating.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Transformatörün kendi kVA değerine göre yüzde empedansı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentuale Impedanz des Transformators basierend auf seiner eigenen kVA-Nennleistung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'impédance du transformateur basé sur sa propre puissance nominale en kVA.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de impedancia del transformador basado en su propia potencia nominal en kVA.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
